goal: Replace the current bloated supplier/inventory emphasis with a practical supplier procurement analysis direction.
deliverable: A reviewable implementation plan covering scope cuts, data-model changes, supplier reports, trend charts, and Excel exports.
constraints: Do not keep supplier evaluation logic
Do not keep inventory in the current user-facing scope
acceptance_criteria: The plan defines what will be removed
The plan defines how supplier attribution becomes trustworthy
The plan defines monthly/yearly report and export deliverables
non_goals: Immediate code execution in this round
